name: dev-workflow
description: 分级开发工作流路由（L0-L4）：判级加固、跨 session 续行、跨项目自主进化、codegraph 判级集成、grill-me 设计追问、多模型协作委派（codex / gemini / mimo）。

interface.shortDescription: Route development work by L0-L4 risk and verification depth
interface.longDescription: Use Dev Workflow to classify development tasks, choose the right skill chain, preserve resumable workflow state, collect judgment corrections, and optionally calibrate risk with code-review-graph.
defaultPrompt: Choose the right workflow level for this change.
Help me implement this feature with the dev workflow.
